testcase.name: Should handle exact tie scenario: attr='abc' 5 times, attr='def' 5 times
Should be deterministic - same input produces same output
Should throw exception for empty list
Should handle nullable properties when non-null is most frequent
Should handle nullable properties when null is most frequent
Should find most frequent values in simple data class
Should handle single item list by returning that item
Should work with extension function syntax
Should handle ties by picking first occurrence in groupBy order
Verify frequency counting logic with detailed assertions
Should handle complex objects with sets and nested objects
Should handle list where all items are identical
